idea: NanoEuler – GPT-2 scale model in pure C/CUDA from scratch

research.problem_statement: Businesses in other spend significant manual effort on: NanoEuler – GPT-2 scale model in pure C/CUDA from scratch. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.

research.roi_estimate: Significant time savings. ROI depends on deployment scale.
